title: EXPLAIN ANALYZE
subtitle: Read the plan, find the bottleneck, fix the right node

panels.heading: Seq Scan on large table
bullets: Fix: add index on filter column

panels.heading: Sort: external merge Disk
bullets: Fix: SET work_mem higher for session

panels.heading: Nested Loop × high rows
bullets: Fix: ANALYZE table, check stats target

panels.heading: Hash Join: batches > 1
bullets: Fix: increase work_mem or reduce join set

footer: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT TEXT) — always include BUFFERS to see I/O reality.
